title: Doupo Cangqiong: Q Ban Xiao Juchang

synonyms: Battle Through the Heavens: Q Version Small Theater
Dou Po Cang Qiong: Q Ban Xiao Juchang

synopsis:
Here you'll find the most fantastical Dou Qi Continent, the most absurd romantic entanglements, the most explosive celebrity secrets, and the most confusing love-hate relationships. The Dou Po singing Q-version reality show will reveal the behind-the-scenes stories of Doupo Cangqiong.

(Source: Bilibili, translated)
